item.title: BBCSPORTNI: BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 23min Monaghan manager Gabriel Bannigan admitted there was a sense of "relief" after his side
item.description:
BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 23min Monaghan manager Gabriel Bannigan admitted there was a sense of "relief" after his side secured a 0-27 to 2-14 victory over Cavan to reach the Ulster Championship semi-finals
#BBCGAA 1 1 2 693

item.title: BBCSPORTNI: BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 22min En respuesta a @BBCSPORTNI Read more here De bbc.co.uk 1 486
item.description: BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 22min En respuesta a @BBCSPORTNI Read more here De bbc.co.uk 1 486

item.title:
officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 27min Fergal Whitely's term as Ambasadóir Gaeilge CLG comes to an end on Monday. GRMA Fergal!
W
item.description:
The GAA @officialgaa · 27min Fergal Whitely's term as Ambasadóir Gaeilge CLG comes to an end on Monday. GRMA Fergal!
Watch it in full here: https:// youtu.be/EcdEdAiz9-o
#GAAgaeilge @KCrokesGAAClub
@DubGAAOfficial 3 2 mil

item.title: MeathGAA: Meath GAA @MeathGAA · 1h The result may not have gone the way we wanted today in our Leinster Senior Football Championsh
item.description:
Meath GAA @MeathGAA · 1h The result may not have gone the way we wanted today in our Leinster Senior Football Championship Quarter-Final against Westmeath but the support of the Royal Army was outstanding as always.
We will regroup and go again in the All-Ireland Series where once more, your support Mostrar más 2 1 22 3 mil
